ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member responsible for managing the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the team is working on */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member who leads the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team member */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team member is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time required to complete the task */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the task is assigned to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Expected start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the task is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task update */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the task (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes added to the task */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the update record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_updates_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task being worked on */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member who worked on the task */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the time was logged */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Number of hours spent on the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the time log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task being assigned */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member the task is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_roles" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the team member */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id", "role_id")
)
